title: Inside Andy Burnham’s 1st Day as U.K. Prime Minister
description: As Andy Burnham became Britain’s seventh leader in a decade on Monday, he tried to show that he will govern differently.
summary: Andy Burnham became the new Prime Minister of the U.K., marking a change in leadership, and he aimed to demonstrate a different approach to governance on his first day in office.

title: Andy Burnham, New UK Prime Minister, Names John Healey As Top Finance Official
description: As chancellor, John Healey, who quit as defense secretary in the former government, will fill one of the most consequential posts, overseeing fiscal and economic policy.
summary: Andy Burnham has been named as the new UK Prime Minister and has appointed John Healey as his top finance official, with Healey taking on the role of chancellor. Healey previously served as defense secretary in the former government. He will oversee fiscal and economic policy.

title: G.O.P. Boxed In on Iran War as Trump Sidelines Congress
description: Republicans now face a worst-case political scenario of being asked to fund an unpopular war over which they have exercised little oversight.
summary: Republicans are facing a difficult situation as they may be asked to fund an unpopular war in Iran without having much control over the decision, a scenario that could be politically challenging for them. This comes as former President Trump has taken a step back from involving Congress in the matter.

title: Trump to Impose 50% Tariff on Many Canadian Goods
description: The administration will use an untested legal provision to put significant duties on Canadian exports, reigniting a clash with one of America’s biggest trading partners.
summary: The US administration plans to impose a 50% tariff on many Canadian goods, using an untested legal provision, which is expected to reignite a trade clash with Canada. This move is likely to impact Canadian exports to the US. The exact details of the affected goods are not specified.

title: Trump Rejected Nearly 6,000 Clemency Applications Amid Hope of Pardon Wave
description: Expectations were raised for a raft of pardons in connection with the country’s 250th birthday but the president granted fewer than 20 on July 3.
summary: US President Trump rejected nearly 6,000 clemency applications, despite initial hopes for a large-scale pardon wave, particularly around the country's 250th birthday. Only a small number of pardons were granted on July 3. The high number of rejected applications has sparked interest in the president's clemency process.

title: Who's in Andy Burnham's cabinet?
description: An in-depth look at which Labour MPs have been appointed to cabinet roles by new Prime Minister Andy Burnham
summary: New Prime Minister Andy Burnham has appointed Labour MPs to cabinet roles, but the article does not specify the details of these appointments. The article promises an in-depth look at the cabinet, but the actual content is not provided.

title: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
description: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.
summary: US President Trump has imposed 50% tariffs on Canada, escalating trade tensions between the two North American neighbors. Canadian Prime Minister Carney has vowed to "intensify" trade talks in response. The move is a significant escalation in their trade dispute.

title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
description: The US says the attacks were aimed at degrading Iran's capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
summary: The US has launched fresh strikes on Iran, targeting the country's capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz. The move comes after President Trump warned of retaliation for the deaths of US soldiers. The strikes are a significant escalation in the ongoing tensions between the two nations.

title: Man, 28, charged with murder of Ann Widdecombe
description: Joshua Kerry from Rotherham will appear at Westminster Magistrates' Court on Tuesday.
summary: A 28-year-old man, Joshua Kerry, has been charged with the murder of Ann Widdecombe, although it is unclear which Ann Widdecombe is being referred to in the article. The man is set to appear in court on Tuesday.

title: At least 27 dead and 83 missing after passenger ferry capsizes off Guyana
description: An investigation into the tragedy has been launched, the island's prime minister says, adding he hopes more will be found alive.
summary: A passenger ferry capsized off the coast of Guyana, resulting in at least 27 deaths and 83 people missing. An investigation has been launched into the tragedy. The prime minister of Guyana expressed hope that more survivors will be found.
